title: pteris pedata subvar. elegans
intro: Pteris pedata subvar. elegans, also known as the fan fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Pteris genus and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pteris pedata subvar. elegans include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction, made by steeping the dried leaves in hot water, to treat various health conditions.
